650003.name: Wrath Wheel
descriptionLines: A large chunk of metal from somewhere in the Barmund Mansion.
It was terribly transformed em the magic interference device installed em the Illusionians.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Swirling Petal^000000 em 15%.
Diminui o tempo de conjuração variável em 2%.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Cross Slash^000000 em 15%.
Diminui ^009900Swirling Petal^000000 skill cooldown em 2 segundos.
Diminui ^009900Cross Slash^000000 skill cooldown em 1 segundo.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Swirling Petal^000000 e ^009900Cross Slash^000000 em additional 20%.

650004.name: Patent Clarity Huuma Shuriken
descriptionLines: A wind eagle sword used em a famous ninja.
The blue energy began to show off its natural strength.
It resonates with Great Hero Boots.
Aumenta o dano físico de ataque à distância em 2%.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Swirling Petal^000000 em 30%.
Diminui o tempo de conjuração variável em 10%.
Diminui ^009900Swirling Petal^000000 skill cooldown em 1 segundo.
Aumenta o dano físico contra ^FF0000Fogo^000000, ^777777Sombrio^000000 e ^777777Sagrado^000000 elemental monsters em 20%.
Aumenta o dano físico contra ^FF0000Morto-vivo^000000, ^FF0000Demônio^000000 e ^FF0000Anjo^000000 raças de monstros em 20%.
Aumenta o dano físico de ataque à distância em 5%.

650007.name: Huuma do Comandante
descriptionLines: Uma Shuriken Huuma imbuído com a energia de espíritos malignos.
Aumenta o dano físico e mágico contra monstros da raça^ff0000Planta^000000 e de elemento ^ff0000Vento^000000 em 5%.
Aumenta o dano físico e mágico contra monstros da raça ^ff0000Planta^000000 e de elemento^ff0000Vento^000000 em +5%.
Aumenta o dano físico e mágico contra monstros da raça ^ff0000Planta^000000 e de elemento^ff0000Vento^000000 em +10%.

650008.name: Adulter Fides Huuma Shuriken
descriptionLines: A huuma shuriken filled with false beliefs.
Increases o dano of ^009900Swirling Petal^000000 by 10%.
Increases o dano of ^009900Swirling Petal^000000 by additional 20%.
Decreases ^009900Swirling Petal^000000 skill cooldown by 2 seconds.
Increases o dano of ^009900Swirling Petal^000000 by additional 25%.
Increases ranged physical o dano by 15%.

650009.name: Adulter Fides Cross-Shaped Huuma Shuriken
descriptionLines: A cross-shaped huuma shuriken filled with false beliefs.
Increases o dano of ^009900Cross Slash^000000 by 10%.
Increases o dano of ^009900Cross Slash^000000 by additional 20%.
Decreases ^009900Cross Slash^000000 skill cooldown by 2 seconds.
Increases o dano of ^009900Cross Slash^000000 by additional 25%.
Increases ranged physical o dano by 15%.

650010.name: Paradise Ninja Punishment Shuriken
descriptionLines: A huuma shuriken made by the Paradise Group.
Decreases Variable Casting Time of all skills by 10%.
Increases damage of ^009900Flaming Petals^000000 and ^009900Freezing Spear^000000 and ^009900Wind Blade^000000 by 10%.
Increases damage of ^009900Exploding Dragon^000000, ^009900Snow Flake Draft^000000 and ^009900First Wind^000000 by additional 20%.

650011.name: Shuriken Huuma dos Ninjas do Paraíso
descriptionLines: Uma Shuriken Huuma forjada no Grupo Éden.

650012.name: Paradise Kagerou&Oboro Huuma Shuriken
descriptionLines: A high-quality huuma shuriken made by the Paradise Group.
Decreases Variable Casting Time of all skills by 1%.
Increases ^FF0000Fire^000000, ^33CC00Wind^000000 and ^0000BBWater^000000 elemental magic damage by 10%.
Increases damage of ^009900Flaming Petals^000000, ^009900Freezing Spear^000000 and ^009900Wind Blade^000000 by 25%.
Decreases Variable Casting Time of all skills by additional 10%.
Increases Magical Damage against enemies of all sizes by 15%.
Increases damage of ^009900Flaming Petals^000000, ^009900Freezing Spear^000000 and ^009900Wind Blade^000000 by additional 15%.

650013.name: Paradise Kagerou&Oboro Cross Huuma Shuriken
descriptionLines: A high-quality huuma shuriken made by the Paradise Group.
Decreases ^009900Cross Slash^000000 skill cooldown by 2 seconds.
Increases damage of ^009900Cross Slash^000000 and ^009900Swirling Petals^000000 by 25%.
Decreases ^009900Swirling Petals^000000 skill cooldown by 2 seconds.
Increases Physical Damage against enemies of all sizes by 15%.
Increases damage of ^009900Cross Slash^000000 and ^009900Swirling Petals^000000 by additional 15%.
